svg.aria-label: sub-agent-coordinator — many hands, one source of truth
svg.title: sub-agent-coordinator — many hands, one source of truth
svg.desc: Pixel-art banner for the sub-agent-coordinator Claude Code plugin: title at top, a TASK BRIEF card on the left listing scope/budget/done-when, a FAN-OUT card in the center showing one coordinator tile dispatching three parallel sub-agent tiles with status badges, and an INTEGRATE card on the right showing build/lint/test gates passing and a DONE seal. Chapter labels BRIEF · FAN-OUT · INTEGRATE below.

g.text: many hands, one source of truth
